name: 1997-cisco-s-core-products-business-inte-bd8697
title: Cisco's Core Products Business Integrates Routing and Switching
description: Aberdeen Group Company Profile (January 1997) of Cisco Systems analyzing how Cisco evolved from router-only vendor to end-to-end networking solutions provider through acquisitions (StrataCom), IOS investment protection, NetFlow Switching, Tag Switching (precursor to MPLS), and the Gigabit Switch Router (GSR 12000 series).
